channel.title: Posts on GdBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on GdBlog

item.title: Hello everyone on my blog!
item.description:
Hello everyone!

I just wanted to say hello because this is my first post on this blog!

What will I post on my blog?

I will post about my projects (eg: Space…), some hacks on Linux, about bugs in my projects in my hacks and I feel them, etc…
